rationale.R1.6: Reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident; the uncertainty disclosure is in the rationale instead of the output.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
